en: Hey everyone here I am within another shot and today we'll be discussing some

en: Dessert is a sweet dish whereas desert is a hot dry place. Number two borrow and
ko: Dessert는 달콤한 디저트이고 desert는 덥고 건조한 사막이에요. 두 번째는 borrow와

en: lend. Borrow is to take something whereas lend is to give something and expecting
ko: lend입니다. Borrow는 빌리는 것이고 lend는 돌려받을 것을 기대하며

en: it back as well. Number three is effect or effects. Effect is to have an
ko: 빌려주는 거예요. 세 번째는 affect와 effect. Affect는 영향을

en: impact on something whereas effect is the result of being affected. So make
ko: 미치는 것이고 effect는 영향을 받은 결과예요.

en: sure next time you use them you use them correctly in your situations. Thank you
